title: Affect gate
goal: Implement the affect preset table, the qualitative-preset-to-sigmoid expansion (a standalone pure function), sigmoid evaluation, and per-task affect-feasibility checks.
implementation_notes: May import schema and math only.
Preset table values are in PHASE0_CONTRACT_PROFILE.md; copy them exactly.
sigmoid satisfaction: higher_is_better -> sigmoid((x-location)/scale); lower_is_better -> sigmoid((location-x)/scale).
Feasible iff every active dimension satisfaction >= threshold.
Preset-to-profile mapping MUST be callable outside any CLI flow (reused by v1.5 recalibrate).
Do not expose raw sigmoid parameters to users.
